name: Oil Leases and Gas Wells by District & Operator Index
accessType: public web page with linked PDF indexes
usedFor: Public source records for oil leases and gas wells by district, operator, oil/gas classification, lease name, field, and county.
limitations: The index identifies leases and counties but does not provide exact map coordinates; records may need manual matching to wellbore or GIS data before precise mapping.
citationNote: Use when citing RRC oil lease and gas well index records extracted from the district PDF indexes.

name: Franklin Project and East Texas Lithium Brine Disclosures
accessType: public company project page, news release, and SEC filing
usedFor: Public-source context for East Texas lithium brine project areas, inferred resource zones, and exploration wells in the Smackover Formation.
limitations: These disclosures describe project areas and exploration wells but do not always provide exact public coordinates for each well or lease tract.
citationNote: Use with notes that project and well coordinates may be approximate until confirmed against public filings, figures, or regulatory records.

name: Surface Mining & Reclamation
usedFor: General context about Texas coal/lignite mining, uranium exploration, and regulatory authority.
limitations: This page provides regulatory context, not necessarily a downloadable site-by-site dataset.
citationNote: Use for explaining why coal/lignite and uranium are included.

name: Surface Mining Programs
usedFor: Program-level links and context for abandoned mine land, surface coal mining, uranium exploration, and quarry or pit safety topics.
limitations: This page organizes program links and context; individual linked documents may need separate review before extracting site records.
citationNote: Use as a navigation and context source for RRC surface mining program areas.

name: Mining Permits
accessType: public web page with linked permit documents
usedFor: Permit-related source links, including permitted coal mining locations, coal mine contacts, uranium exploration permits, and permitted acreage.
limitations: Some permit information is provided through linked PDFs or documents that may require manual review or conversion before mapping.
citationNote: Use when citing permit status, permitted locations, or permit-related context from RRC source materials.

name: Global Rare Earth Element Occurrence Database
usedFor: Reference data and context for rare earth element deposits and occurrences, including locations and descriptive geologic information where available.
limitations: The database is global in scope and may include records with varying detail or records without plottable locations.
citationNote: Use when citing rare earth element occurrence data from the USGS data release.

name: Mineral Resources Data System
usedFor: Legacy reference information about mineral deposits, mines, prospects, and occurrences in the United States and selected other countries.
limitations: This is an older dataset and should be treated as historical reference material rather than current operating status.
citationNote: Use only with a note that MRDS is legacy/historical and should be verified against newer sources before use in current analysis.

name: U.S. Energy Information Administration / RRC field data
usedFor: Source metadata for Oil records in the Texas Natural Resource Atlas dataset.
limitations: Imported from the user-provided major natural resource sites file. Coordinates may be representative centroids for broad fields, districts, projects, or facilities rather than legal boundaries or exact operational points.
citationNote: Use when citing imported records with sourceId EIA-TOP100-OILGAS-2015.
